meta.title: About Villa Mandara | A home among the herbs
meta.description: Six rooms named after the hours of the day, a herb garden, a pool and quiet — Villa Mandara near Gorna Kovachitsa.

intro.lead: Villa Mandara was made for one home at a time. Six rooms, a shared living room, an outdoor pool and a herb garden — a place where every group stays alone, at its own pace, wrapped in the silence of the Rhodopes.

architecture.title: Stone, wood and light
architecture.body: The villa follows the slope — stone foundations, oak beams and wide windows that let the mountain inside. Restrained and warm, the architecture is in dialogue with the landscape, not above it.

interior.title: Comfort woven from nature
interior.body: Linen, wool, clay and wood in natural tones. A spacious living room with a fireplace, a long table for shared dinners and quiet reading corners — all in the palette of the earth.

garden.title: Herbs within reach
garden.body: A living garden of mint, rosemary, lavender and garden sage grows around the villa. Pick, dry, steep — Mandara's herbal rituals begin at the doorstep and end in a cup of tea before sleep.

wellness.title: Water, sun and calm
wellness.body: An outdoor pool with a terrace facing the mountain, loungers in the shade and a quiet corner to restore. The day flows slowly here — exactly as long as it needs to.

rooms.title: Six hours of the day
rooms.subtitle: Each room carries the name of a moment in the day.
rooms.lead: From the soft blue of Dawn to the deep calm of Night — the six rooms follow the light through the day. Different in character, united by the same natural materials and breath of herbs.

items.sixRooms: Six rooms with their own character

location.title: Where the noise ends
location.body: Villa Mandara sits in Mandara Village near Gorna Kovachitsa — tucked into the Western Rhodopes, far from everything and close to yourself.
